task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Validated Registration Form** (Level 7)

Build a registration endpoint POST /api/register with strict validation: email (required, valid email format), password (required, min 8 chars), name (required, max 100 chars), age (number, min 13). Return detailed error messages on 400.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required, min 8
  name, required, max 100
  age, number

# Your end
final_source:
build for javascript backend

/*
  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │       Validated Registration Form        │
  │                                          │
  │  Users Table                             │
  │    email (unique), password,             │
  │    name, age                             │
  │                          │               │
  │  POST /api/register      │               │
  │    → validate fields     │               │
  │    → save new user       ▼               │
  │    → 201 with id / 400 with errors       │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────┘
*/

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique
  password, required
  name, required
  age, number

# Registration
when user sends user to /api/register:
  validate user:
    email is text, required, matches email
    password is text, required, min 8
    name is text, required, max 100
    age is number, min 13
  saved = save user as new Users
  send back saved with status 201
